agentRecommendation.reasoning: Storm clouds forming over Port Phillip Bay from Arthur's Seat — exactly the 'cover of a magazine section' editorial register. 5184x2444 panoramic crop fits a hero strip without forced cropping. Ground-level elevated view (not aerial/drone). SA override required.

rejected.note: CC-BY 3.0 clean licence but 2000x1177 — below minimum. Valuable for secondary slots.

editorOverrides.reason: CC-BY-SA 4.0 accepted — contingent on blanket SA policy approval.

notes: AWAITING EDITOR SIGNATURE. Contingent on CC-BY-SA policy.

implementerAction.altText: Storm clouds forming over Port Phillip Bay, seen from Arthur's Seat on the Mornington Peninsula
implementerAction.caption: The Peninsula from Arthur's Seat, storm rolling in.
